mainEntity.name: How much money do they usually pay out for a work-related slip and fall settlement?

acceptedAnswer.text: Settlement value depends on your medical expenses, lost wages, and permanent impairment rating. Workers comp typically covers all medical bills and pays about two-thirds of your lost wages, plus a lump sum if you have lasting physical limitations after healing.
